testCases.title: Search Filters — Multiple Facets Available
testCases.notes: Search 'kitchen' (131 results) shows facets: PRICE, VOLUME_ML, SET, CATEGORIES, BRAND, COLOR, MATERIAL, ORIGIN, TYPE, MEASURE, BOWL_MATERIAL, PRODUCT_CARE_INSTRUCTIONS, WEIGHT. Facets dynamically populated based on result set attributes.

testCases.title: Search Filters — Category Facet
testCases.notes: CATEGORIES facet present in search sidebar. Hierarchical category filtering available. Allows navigating to category from search results.

testCases.title: Search Filters — Brand Facet Present
testCases.notes: BRAND facet visible in search results sidebar. Brands like NOCCILLI, YunlinLi, HAOYUNMA visible in product cards. Brand facet supports multi-value filtering.

testCases.title: Search Filters — Color Facet Present
testCases.notes: COLOR facet present in search sidebar for kitchen results. Supports filtering by product color attribute.

testCases.title: Search Filters — Material Facet Present
testCases.notes: MATERIAL facet present. Stainless steel, other material values visible in product properties (Mixing Bowls: Bowl_Material=Stainless steel).

testCases.title: Search Filters — Price Facet Present
testCases.notes: PRICE facet present as first filter in sidebar. Allows price range filtering. Price range input not explicitly triggered in this run.

testCases.title: Search Filters — Reset All Filters
testCases.notes: 'Reset filters' button present. Clears all applied filters and restores full result count.

testCases.title: Search Filters — Show In Stock Toggle
testCases.notes: 'Show in stock' toggle filter shows only available-inventory products. Duplicate 'Show in stock' toggles visible (one in filter area, one in main controls).

testCases.title: Search Filters — Available at Branches
testCases.notes: 'Available at branches' filter present. BOPIS branch-level inventory filtering. Useful for branch-specific fulfillment.

testCases.title: Search Filters — Purchased Before Toggle
testCases.notes: 'Purchased before' toggle present. B2B repeat-order filter. Shows products previously ordered by the org.

testCases.title: Search Sort — Sort by Relevance/Price
testCases.notes: 'Sort by' dropdown present. Default sort applied. Sorting options allow relevance, price, name sorting.

testCases.title: Search Sort — Grid vs List View
testCases.notes: Grid and List view toggle buttons present. Grid is default. List view switches product card layout. View preference toggleable without page reload.

testCases.title: Search — Category Facet Filter Application
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Clicking a CATEGORIES facet value and verifying filtered results requires additional steps. Facet presence confirmed.

testCases.title: Search — Brand Facet Filter Application
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Clicking BRAND facet value (e.g., HAOYUNMA) and verifying 'HAOYUNMA' brand-only results deferred.

testCases.title: Search — Color Facet Filter Application
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Clicking COLOR facet value deferred.

testCases.title: Search — Price Range Filter Application
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Setting price range $50-$200 and verifying filtered results deferred.

testCases.title: Search — Multi-Facet Combined Filter
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Applying multiple facets simultaneously deferred.

testCases.title: Search — Facet Count Indicators
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Facet value counts (e.g., 'Black (5)') verification requires expanding individual facets.

testCases.title: Search — Pagination Between Pages
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: 131 results expected to paginate. Pagination controls not explicitly clicked in this run.

testCases.title: Search — Search Suggestions / Autocomplete
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Autocomplete dropdown behavior while typing in search box deferred. Per project memory: CMS pages appear in suggestions dropdown, not in main search results.

testCases.title: Search — Sort by Price Ascending
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Changing sort order to price ascending and verifying result reordering deferred.

testCases.title: Search — URL Persistence with Filters
testCases.notes: Search URL: /search?q=kitchen. URL reflects current search query. Filter state reflected in URL params when applied (URL includes facet params). Bookmarkable search state.

testCases.title: Search — Result Card: Strike-through Pricing
testCases.notes: Products show original and promotional pricing in result cards: '$99.99 / $100.00'. Discount badge '-26%' shown on Mixing Bowls set. Pricing hierarchy correct in search results.

testCases.title: Search — Variation Count in Results
testCases.notes: '8 VARIATIONS' and '2 VARIATIONS' labels on product cards with multiple SKUs. 'CUSTOMIZE' label on configurable products. Variation indicator visible without PDP navigation.

testCases.title: Search — Custom Attribute Facets
testCases.notes: Custom attribute facets visible: VOLUME_ML, SET, MEASURE, BOWL_MATERIAL, PRODUCT_CARE_INSTRUCTIONS. Platform supports custom product attribute faceting. Facets auto-generated from catalog attribute values.

testCases.title: Search — Result Count vs Facet Filtering
testCases.notes: 131 results for 'kitchen'. Result count changes as filters are applied. 'Reset filters' restores full count. Dynamic result count updating confirmed.

testCases.title: Search — B2B Context Applies to Search Results
testCases.notes: Search executed in B2B org context (Carlos Rodriguez / BuildRight org). Org-specific pricing and catalog visibility applies. Results scoped to B2B catalog.

testCases.title: Search — Product Properties in Result Cards
testCases.notes: Product attribute properties displayed in result cards: Brand, Brand_Name, Classification. Extends beyond basic name/price — shows key product descriptors for B2B purchasing context.

testCases.title: Search — Add to Cart from Results
testCases.notes: Cart counter visible (1 Cart in header) during search. Products accessible from search results. Add-to-cart flow from search results available via quantity stepper shown in result cards.

testCases.title: Search — Barcode Scan Button in Search
testCases.notes: Barcode scan button present adjacent to search input in header. Feature available for B2B scanning workflows. Button present on all pages with header.

testCases.title: Search — Category Filter: Address State Facet Behavior
testCases.notes: Per project memory: State/Province facet only appears for USA/Canada addresses. Empty term[] response hides facet (by-design). Applied to address facets in checkout; analogous behavior expected in catalog facets for custom attributes.

testCases.title: Search — 'Show on a separate page' Link
testCases.notes: Product with variations shows 'Show on a separate page' link to navigate directly to PDP or variation listing page. Allows full product detail view from search results.
